key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often Codex Stats refreshes local Codex usage data.

key.name: log-root
key.description: Directory containing local Codex JSONL session logs.

key.name: show-day
key.summary: Show daily token burn in the panel

key.name: show-primary
key.summary: Show short-window remaining usage in the panel

key.name: show-secondary
key.summary: Show weekly remaining usage in the panel

key.name: panel-show-usage
key.summary: Show usage next to the panel icon
key.description: When enabled, the top bar shows compact 5h and weekly remaining percentages next to the icon.

key.name: cache-enabled
key.description: Store parsed token_count metadata in the user cache directory for faster refreshes.

key.name: account-limits-enabled
key.description: Ask the local Codex CLI for the current account rate-limit snapshot when available.

key.name: active-provider
key.description: Which provider's usage is shown in the panel and popover (codex or claude).

key.name: claude-enabled
key.description: Show Claude Code as a selectable provider. Token usage is read locally; live 5h/weekly limits require the statusLine capture.

key.name: claude-log-root
key.description: Directory containing local Claude Code JSONL session transcripts.

key.name: claude-limits-file
key.description: JSON file the statusLine capture writes with Claude 5h/weekly rate-limit metadata.

key.name: claude-online-usage
key.description: Opt-in. When enabled, the helper makes a network request to the Anthropic usage API using your local Claude login token to read live 5h/weekly and per-model (Sonnet/Opus) limits. Off by default to keep the extension fully local. Only numeric usage metadata is read.
